title: Scar's Oval Shield
description: Makes the Minecraft shield Oval shaped
body:
# **🛡️ Scar's Oval Shield – A New Shape for Protection**

Oval Shield replaces the default Minecraft shield with a realistic 3D oval-shaped design, giving your defense gear a smoother and more immersive look while keeping the original Minecraft feel.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f58ea5ae22cee8cf374828eefacfcdf0376ff876_0.webp)

## **✨ Features**

- 🟤 Custom 3D model for a natural oval shape
 
- 🎨 High-quality textures that match vanilla Minecraft style
 
- ⚙️ Works seamlessly with all resource packs
  
- 🧱 Compatible with OptiFine, Iris & Sodium
  
- 🧍 Perfect for medieval, PvP, or roleplay builds

------------------------------------------------------------------

## **🧩 Requirements**

- 💻 Minecraft Java Edition 

- 📦 Works on Vanilla, Fabric, or OptiFine setups

-----------------------------------------------------------------
## 
## **📥 How to Install**

1.⬇️ Download the .zip file from Modrinth

2.📂 Move it to your Minecraft resourcepacks folder

3.✅ Enable it in the Resource Packs menu

------------------------------------------------------------------

**📌 Note:** This pack only changes the visual model of the shield — no gameplay changes.
